failures.description: No observable failure occurred in the provided trajectory.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent followed the required plan: it searched the product catalog with available_only=true, backlight=RGB, and product_type=Mechanical Keyboard, then filtered the returned evidence for prices strictly greater than $233.90. The tool returned five items, but only two prices were greater than 233.90: 272.33 and 237.48. The item priced exactly 233.90 was correctly excluded. No tool invocation error, unsupported intent, invented information, or misinterpretation is evident.
